title: Training on Wheat Threshing in the Experimental Field, School of Agriculture
content: The primary goal of these trainings is to provide hands-on experience and practical knowledge to the farmers and students. Participants gain practical insights into wheat threshing techniques, and the hands-on experience in the experimental field enhance their understanding of the process. The combination of theoretical knowledge and practical application equip them with valuable skills that can be applied in real-world agricultural settings.
